pi_items.source: task.json description and task.py payload match exactly; verified against iDempiere R_REQUESTTYPE table structure (Window ID-244)
task.json description states this as the expected Request Category name; verified against iDempiere R_CATEGORY table structure (Window ID-345)
task.json description states this as the expected Request Group name; verified against iDempiere R_GROUP table structure (Window ID-346)
task.json description states this as the expected Request Resolution name; verified against iDempiere R_RESOLUTION table in Request Management module

privileged_info_summary: The task expects an agent to create four synthetic CRM metadata records in iDempiere's GardenWorld client: (1) Request Type named 'Design Consultation', (2) Request Category named 'Plant Selection', (3) Request Group named 'Design Team', and (4) Request Resolution named 'Proposal Accepted'. These records do not exist in the real GardenWorld seed data and must be created by the agent. All metadata values are internally consistent with the task description and correspond to real iDempiere database tables (R_REQUESTTYPE, R_CATEGORY, R_GROUP, R_RESOLUTION) in the Request Management module.
